programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
Oona and May argue over which one is the fastest and decide to have a race to find out.
Silky is stranded after a storm. Oona and Baba come to her rescue.
Happy feels worried when he loses a spike...
Rug Island: Bluey and Bingo pretend that they are living on a desert island in the back garden. Dad needs to embrace his inner kid if he wants to make Rug Island his home too.
Workopolis: Can Oswaldo overcome laziness and join his friends at the Workopolis Amusement park?
Jeorigins Jermaine Begins: Little Jermaine faces his fears to retrieve a lost toy and discovers his new persona.
It's time for Daniel to go to sleep, but there's just one problem...he's not feeling sleepy! Daniel learns how to get calm and relax his body for bed.
Oxygen and the gang bite off more than they can chew when they offer to carry Helium's bag up some steps.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'u', and we go on an adventure around the sound. We go up, then underground, and meet an upbeat umbrella!
When Grandmaster Glitch builds his effigy in ice, his digging threatens the Lambert Glacier in Antarctica.
Nori and Dot are stuck in a treehouse without a door. How can Mojo and Bo get them out? By sending the treehouse flying across town, that's how!
Super Bradbury: Virgilier, Fifi and Cochonchon dream of becoming superheroes. Oli and Titus show them that you don't need superpowers, only super friends.
New Friends from the Farm: Today, Oli and Titus are looking after the Bobois' animals. But after so many good times, will they manage to return them to their owners?

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: The Girl from the Gas Station: Lex and Plu need to deliver Grover the Bear to his destination, but Grover's fast asleep, and the guys have no idea where to take him.
Get Well Soon: Camp Leader has a cold. All she needs is rest, but Odo and Doodle organise a get-well-soon parade.
The Blue Feather: Odo and Doodle catch a brief glimpse of a blue bird and go on a quest to find a bird that they think will look just like Doodle.
Hugo and Sonia realise the fun that can be had in repurposing their broken things. (SL)
Following an adventure with her rock friend, Sonia remembers the value of staying at home with the family. (SL)
Glimmering Thunder Rhythm: Lightning turns Fuzzy Yellow's grape vines into ruby vines, while Bao Bao and Marzipan create musical instruments and Bennu has voice problems. (SL)
Oona and May argue over which one is the fastest and decide to have a race to find out.
Silky is stranded after a storm. Oona and Baba come to her rescue.
Happy feels worried when he loses a spike...
Amazing Maze: Hooper builds an amazing fairy tale maze, but his friends get lost in it.
Henry meets a friendly lighthouse who needs to light the way for a small boat as it heads towards the shore - but his bulb has gone.
Holiday: Seamus & Little Woo are going on holiday so Stanley offers to give them a ride... but oh no, they've got the day wrong.
Sofa: Stan is called to fix Myrtle's sofa while she watches her favourite dance show with Hettie and Hattie.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Sheep Stampede: Diesel tells Nia that using her whistle to find Farmer McColl's sheep isn't fair, so she tries not to use it.
Ana and Ray start a book club with their new friend Wiggles. Wiggles goes missing but hopefully he'll worm his way back before the end of the story!?
Happy As A Hippo: Mayor Eithne arrives to inspect Peek Zoo for its annual Tidy Zoo Certificate.
Nighty Night: The Peeks are settling the animals down for the night when a barn owl pays a surprise visit.
Múineann Mummy Pig do Peppa cén chaoi ligeann ort féin le caochadh súile. Taispeánann Peppa ansin é do George agus do Zoe, atá tagtha ar cuairt lena moncaí bréige.
Tagann Police Officer Panda agus Police Officer Squirrel ar cuairt ag grúpa spraoi Peppa.
Oisín and Síofra meet an owl that can't sleep. Rúbaí is getting ready to go camping and Fionn comes up with some new music.
Pre-school animation following the adventures of Cornelius the crab.
Pre-school animation following the adventures of Sparkles the monkey.
Simon feels left out and thinks his friends don't want to play with him anymore.
Dinner is Served: While flying through the sky, Nemi's parents happen to spot Nemi. Thinking they're witnessing a hunting moment, they discover Nemi is tickling Kenny.
Andy And The Humpback Whale: Andy heads to the Pacific Ocean, off the coast of Mexico in search of a humpback whale.
Nori and Dot are stuck in a treehouse without a door. How can Mojo and Bo get them out? By sending the treehouse flying across town, that's how!

Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Oona, Baba and Otto search for a special bird - the White Egret!
Oona and Silky go exploring in the Kelp Forest, and rescue Bernie who is stranded.
Happy and his friends kindly help a confused cat who's lost her way.
Charades: Bluey and Bingo want everyone to play charades, but Muffin and Socks are too young to understand the rules. Nana must think quickly to keep the game on track.
Hunger Roulade: At Mary Lee's countryside house, the kids learn there's only one dessert available. A hide and seek game will decide who will get it.
He's not that into Woof: Oswaldo adopts a puppy but finds the responsibilities involved, challenging.
Prince Wednesday is coming over for a grr-ific sleepover. But when the boys just want to stay up and play, their babysitter, Prince Tuesday, helps them wind down for bed.
Sulfur & Phosphorus attempt to bend the rules at a banana eating competition, but things get slightly out of hand.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'v', and they go on an adventure around the sound. We see a van and a volcano, and meet a violet violin!
Grandmaster Glitch's giant ball game threatens El Castillo. Can the Go Jetters bounce back and save it?
An old map, mysterious clues, and ancient secrets... Mojo and Bo are after the treasure of the Knights of Swoppiton! But Preston's after it too, and they need to get there first.
Sleeping Bella: It's the night of the shooting stars. Oli tries to wake Bella up to enjoy it, but Bella becomes sleepwalking, taking all the inhabitants with her.
The Trouble Makers: Bella wants to spend more time with her sister Oli. She gets Titus away by asking P'tit Rex to wreck everything in the town. Titus repairs, Oli investigates.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: The Gregnapping: Lex and Plu need to take their passenger, a photographer, to several different locations to look for his lost camera.
Myrtles Visit: Camp Leader's sister makes a surprise visit to camp, and they get into a sibling rivalry that culminates in a bagpipe duel.
Rock and Roll Doodle Part 1: Doodle's favourite grunge band comes to play at camp, but the campers need to build a windmill to give the band enough electricity to play super loud
When a family recipe doesn't go to plan, Hugo and Sonia learn to adapt and invent something new. (SL)
Marzipants the Cat helps Hugo and Sonia learn the importance of sharing. (SL)
Spy Satellite Float: Ray (the sun) and Wisp (a cloud) are upset that their friend Moonbeam is missing. Fuzzy Yellow and Bennu go on a Moonbeam rescue mission. (SL)
Oona, Baba and Otto search for a special bird - the White Egret!
Oona and Silky go exploring in the Kelp Forest, and rescue Bernie who is stranded.
Happy and his friends kindly help a confused cat who's lost her way.
Phoebe's Hotel: As it's rainy, Phoebe decides to play hotel - will the game go as well as she hopes?
Henry meets a friendly rooster who needs to wake up the farmer so he can feed the animals - but he has a sore throat and can't crow.
Stuck: Mayor Myrtle is stuck in her bedroom and needs Stanley to get her out so she can get to the school for Tree Planting Day.
Circus: Ari has arranged a circus performance for the school children, but the circus has to cancel.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: The Berry Best: Thomas goes too far when taking 'just a few' strawberries again and again uses up all the fruit in Farmer McColl's field.
Ray must decide what to do with the special carrot he's grown, but with so many good suggestions, sometimes making a decision is the hardest part!
The Elephant Tooth Fairy: Jimmy loses his first ever baby tooth and is excited about the Tooth Fairy's visit.
Yummy Scrummy Ice Pops: It's a hot day at Peek Zoo, and the penguins keep hiding under the visitors' sun shades.
Tá Peppa agus a cairde ag spraoi le chéile agus ag déanamh neart aclaíochta sa ghairdín ag hapáil, ag scipeáil agus ag léim.
Tá Seirbhís Tarrthála Miss Rabbit tagtha i gcabhair ar go leor leor daoine. Ach céard a tharlóidh más í Miss Rabbit a bhíonn i dtrioblóid?
The gate to Gearóid's garden is broken and needs to be fixed. With the support of his friends, Oisín learns how to deal with worry.
A tale concerning Bill the Platypus in the pre-school series featuring an assortment of animal characters.
Pre-school series, featuring Chuckles the chicken and an assortment of other animal characters.
The friends are preparing for a surprise party when disaster strikes.
Flight of Kenny: Envying the pterosaurs flying in the sky, Kenny expresses his jealousy to Nemi. In response, Nemi decides to make wings for Kenny to help him fly!
Andy And The Manakin: Disaster strikes at Safari World when Andy accidentally breaks a bowerbird nest that Mr Hammond was going to put on display.
